headlines.title: Virginia Supreme Court blocks Democratic-drawn map voters approved
headlines.description: The Virginia Supreme Court on Friday blocked a new Democratic-drawn congressional map from taking effect, delivering a major boost for Republicans as they defend their narrow House majority in the midterm elections.

headlines.title: Pentagon releases declassified UFO files including images held by government for decades
headlines.description: The Pentagon on Friday began releasing “never-before-seen” files relating to unidentified anomalous phenomena — previously and more infamously known as unidentified flying objects, or UFOs — that the government has been holding onto for decades

headlines.title: How Democrats’ redistricting luck ran out: From the Politics Desk
headlines.description: A series of unfortunate events for Democrats has left Republicans with a clear redistricting advantage as they aim to protect their narrow House majority this fall.

headlines.title: Alabama takes step toward a new congressional map while awaiting court action
headlines.description: Republican lawmakers passed a bill that would set up special primary elections if they are allowed to implement new maps after the U.S. Supreme Court’s redistricting ruling.

headlines.title: ‘No remedy for Democrats’ after Virginia Supreme Court’s blow to new map
headlines.description: NBC News’ Ryan Nobles and Jane Timm, along with Loyola Marymount University’s Professor Justin Levitt, bring their latest reporting and legal analysis on redistricting efforts throughout the country as the Virginia Supreme Court overturns a new Democratic-drawn congressional map passed by referendum. The NAACP is suing Tennessee over its new Republican-drawn congressional map. The NAACP general counsel, Kristen Clarke, joins Meet the Press NOW to explain their case.

headlines.title: Virginia Supreme Court blocks congressional map favoring Democrats
headlines.description: The Virginia Supreme Court blocked a new Democratic-drawn congressional map from taking effect weeks after the voters narrowly approved the plan in a statewide vote. NBC News' Jane Timm explains how this delivers a major boost to Republicans as they defend their narrow House majority in the midterm elections.

headlines.title: Pope Leo XIV Marks One Year Since Historic Election as Pontiff
headlines.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio met with Pope Leo XIV for a private one-on-one meeting at the Apostolic Palace where discussions included Iran and the growing tensions between the United States and Cuba. His visit comes after months of public sparring between the White House and the pontiff over the administration’s immigration policies and the war in Iran. It also comes as the pope marks one year since his historic election becoming the first American pontiff in the Catholic Church’s 2,000-y

headlines.title: 'Ohio is back': Both parties navigate competitive midterm races in a forgotten battleground
headlines.description: Two hard facts hover over this year’s midterm races in Ohio.

headlines.title: The front-runners to lead Bernie Sanders' grassroots movement in 2028
headlines.description: The massive grassroots movement that twice rallied behind Bernie Sanders' presidential bids is facing a big question: Who will emerge as its next leader?

headlines.title: How the White House Correspondents’ Association dinner chaos unfolded
headlines.description: Secret Service faced challenges evacuating President, Vice President, Cabinet officials and Congressional leaders after gunman rushes D.C. gala.

headlines.title: U.S. strikes more tankers after exchanging fire with Iran in Strait of Hormuz
headlines.description: The U.S. and Iran exchanged fire near the Strait of Hormuz, raising questions about the negotiations to end the conflict.

headlines.title: Redistricting pits California Republican incumbents against each other in a fight for survival
headlines.description: Facing a tough election challenge is a cost of doing business for members of Congress.
